title: Signal skips flip-flop under some circumstances

features.name: always_ff block with nonblocking signal-to-signal assignment and async reset
features.description: Code should include an always_ff procedural block with non-blocking assignment from one signal to another, using asynchronous reset (negedge) where the reset assigns a constant zero

features.name: nonblocking assignment with evaluation order dependency on source signal update
features.description: Code should include a signal-to-signal non-blocking assignment where the source signal is updated by other logic in the same clock cycle, creating a scenario where evaluation order matters
features.snippet:
logic [63:0] signal_a, signal_b;
always_ff @(posedge clk) signal_b <= signal_a;
